name: MSI MPG Z790 CARBON WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7600+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type C - HDMI 2.1 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E (Z790CARBWIFI)
shortName: MSI MPG Z790 CARBON WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX Z790 gaming motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket with DDR5 and extensive M.2 slots.
